<!-- # Complete Portfolio -->

::: {.column-screen}

## Inputs

::: {.toolbar style="width: 100%;"}

```{ojs}
// Create Investment Amount with currency formatting
viewof investment_amount = createCurrencyInput({
  min: 10000,
  max: 1000000,
  value: 50000,
  step: 5000,
  label: "Investment Amount:",
  decimals: 0
})
```

```{ojs}
// Create Investment Time Horizon
viewof time_horizon = createNumericInput({
  min: 1,
  max: 50,
  value: 5,
  step: 1,
  label: "Projected Time Horizon (Years):",
  format: "integer",
  decimals: 0
})
```

:::

::: {.panel-tabset style="height: calc(100vh - 80px); min-height: 600px; width: 100%;"}

### Performance 

:::: {.columns}

#### Performance Summary Table

```{ojs}
//| echo: false
//| output: false

// Helper function to pre-process daily_quotes data
processedQuotesData = {
  if (!daily_quotes || !daily_quotes.Ticker || !daily_quotes.Date || !daily_quotes.Close) {
    console.error("Invalid daily_quotes data structure:", daily_quotes);
    return null;
  }
  
  // Create a structured mapping of ticker data
  const tickerData = {};
  
  for (let i = 0; i < daily_quotes.Ticker.length; i++) {
    const ticker = daily_quotes.Ticker[i];
    const date = new Date(daily_quotes.Date[i]);
    const close = daily_quotes.Close[i];
    const type = daily_quotes.Type[i];
    
    // Skip entries with null prices or type "Other"
    if (close === null || isNaN(close) || type === "Other") continue;
    
    if (!tickerData[ticker]) {
      tickerData[ticker] = {
        dates: [],
        prices: [],
        types: []
      };
    }
    
    tickerData[ticker].dates.push(date);
    tickerData[ticker].prices.push(close);
    tickerData[ticker].types.push(type);
  }
  
  // For each ticker, find first and last valid prices
  const processedData = {};
  
  for (const [ticker, data] of Object.entries(tickerData)) {
    if (data.prices.length === 0) continue;
    
    // Sort dates and prices together
    const sorted = data.dates.map((date, i) => ({
      date,
      price: data.prices[i],
      type: data.types[i]
    })).sort((a, b) => a.date - b.date);
    
    // Get first and last valid prices
    const firstPrice = sorted[0].price;
    const lastPrice = sorted[sorted.length - 1].price;
    const type = sorted[0].type;
    
    // Find weight from equity_tickers if available
    let weight = 1;
    if (Array.isArray(equity_tickers)) {
      const tickerInfo = equity_tickers.find(t => t.Ticker === ticker);
      if (tickerInfo && typeof tickerInfo.Weight === 'string') {
        // Handle percentage strings like "10.00%"
        weight = parseFloat(tickerInfo.Weight.replace('%', '')) / 100;
      } else if (tickerInfo && !isNaN(tickerInfo.Weight)) {
        weight = tickerInfo.Weight;
      }
    }
    
    processedData[ticker] = {
      firstPrice,
      lastPrice,
      weight,
      type
    };
    
    console.log(`Processed ${ticker}: firstPrice=${firstPrice}, lastPrice=${lastPrice}, weight=${weight}, type=${type}`);
  }
  
  return processedData;
}
```

```{ojs}
// Create portfolio metrics display with summary and asset details
portfolioMetricsDisplay = {
  // Check if we have portfolio data
  if (!portfolioData || portfolioData.length === 0) {
    return html`<div class="alert alert-warning">No portfolio data available</div>`;
  }
  
  // Use our pre-processed quotes data or the data from portfolioData
  const tickerPrices = processedQuotesData || portfolioData.tickerFirstLastPrices;
  
  if (!tickerPrices || Object.keys(tickerPrices).length === 0) {
    return html`<div class="alert alert-warning">Incomplete portfolio data - missing price information</div>`;
  }
  
  // Extract date range from portfolio data
  const dateRange = portfolioData.datasetDateRange || {};
  const startDate = dateRange.startDate || new Date();
  const endDate = dateRange.endDate || new Date();
  
  // Calculate time difference in years - fixed division operator
  const yearsDiff = (endDate - startDate) / (1000 * 60 * 60 * 24 * 365);
  
  // First, calculate total weights by asset type
  let equityTotal = 0;
  let bondTotal = 0;
  let equityTickers = [];
  let bondTickers = [];
  
  // First pass: gather all tickers and their types, calculate totals by type
  for (const [ticker, priceData] of Object.entries(tickerPrices)) {
    // Find ticker info from equity_tickers or use type from processed data
    const tickerInfo = Array.isArray(equity_tickers) ? 
      equity_tickers.find(t => t.Ticker === ticker) : null;
    
    const type = tickerInfo?.Type || priceData.type || "Equity";
    
    if (type === "Equity") {
      equityTotal += priceData.weight;
      equityTickers.push(ticker);
    } else if (type === "Bond") {
      bondTotal += priceData.weight;
      bondTickers.push(ticker);
    }
  }
  
  // Process ticker data from portfolio data with correct weights
  const tickerData = {};
  let totalValidTickers = 0;
    
  for (const [ticker, priceData] of Object.entries(tickerPrices)) {
    // Find ticker info from equity_tickers
    const tickerInfo = Array.isArray(equity_tickers) ? 
      equity_tickers.find(t => t.Ticker === ticker) : null;
    
    const type = tickerInfo?.Type || priceData.type || "Equity";
    
    // Add debug logging to inspect price data
    console.log(`Ticker ${ticker} price data:`, priceData);
    
    // Skip tickers with invalid price data
    if (!priceData.firstPrice || !priceData.lastPrice || 
        priceData.firstPrice <= 0 || priceData.lastPrice <= 0) {
      console.warn(`Skipping ticker ${ticker} due to invalid price data`);
      continue;
    }
    
    totalValidTickers++;
    
    // Calculate normalized weight within asset class
    const assetClassWeight = 
      type === "Equity" ? 
        (equityTotal > 0 ? priceData.weight / equityTotal : 0) : 
        (bondTotal > 0 ? priceData.weight / bondTotal : 0);
    
    // Calculate weight in risky portfolio
    const riskyPfWeight = 
      type === "Equity" ?
        assetClassWeight * (typeof equity_weight !== 'undefined' ? equity_weight : 0.6) :
        assetClassWeight * (typeof bond_weight !== 'undefined' ? bond_weight : 0.4);
        
    // Calculate weight in complete portfolio
    const completeWeight = riskyPfWeight * (typeof fixed_optimal_weight !== 'undefined' ? fixed_optimal_weight : 1.0);
    
    // Use the complete weight for initializing the portfolio
    const initialValue = investment_amount * completeWeight;
    
    // Debug log values before calculation
    console.log(`${ticker} - firstPrice: ${priceData.firstPrice}, lastPrice: ${priceData.lastPrice}`);
    
    // Calculate number of shares
    const numberOfShares = initialValue / priceData.firstPrice;
    console.log(`${ticker} - initialValue: ${initialValue}, shares: ${numberOfShares}`);
    
    // Calculate current value
    const currentValue = numberOfShares * priceData.lastPrice;
    console.log(`${ticker} - currentValue calculation: ${numberOfShares} shares * ${priceData.lastPrice} price = ${currentValue}`);
    
    const dollarReturn = currentValue - initialValue;
    
    // Calculate total return percentage
    let totalReturn = 0;
    if (initialValue > 0) {
      totalReturn = currentValue / initialValue - 1;
    }
    
    // Log calculation results
    console.log(`${ticker} final values - initial: ${initialValue}, current: ${currentValue}, return: ${totalReturn}`);
    
    // Calculate annualized return
    let annualizedReturn = 0;
    if (yearsDiff > 0 && totalReturn >= -1 && isFinite(totalReturn)) {
      try {
        annualizedReturn = Math.pow(1 + totalReturn, 1 / yearsDiff) - 1;
        // Double-check the result is valid
        if (!isFinite(annualizedReturn)) annualizedReturn = 0;
      } catch (e) {
        console.error(`Error calculating annualized return for ${ticker}:`, e);
      }
    }
    
    tickerData[ticker] = {
      type: type,
      name: tickerInfo?.Name || ticker,
      sector: tickerInfo?.Sector || "N/A",
      assetClassWeight: assetClassWeight,
      riskyPfWeight: riskyPfWeight,
      completeWeight: completeWeight,
      initialValue,
      currentValue,
      dollarReturn,
      totalReturn,
      annualizedReturn
    };
  }
  
  console.log("Total valid tickers processed:", totalValidTickers);
  
  if (totalValidTickers === 0) {
    return html`<div class="alert alert-danger">No valid ticker data available for portfolio calculations</div>`;
  }
  
  // Calculate portfolio totals
  const totalInitialValue = Object.values(tickerData)
    .reduce((sum, data) => sum + data.initialValue, 0);
    
  const totalCurrentValue = Object.values(tickerData)
    .reduce((sum, data) => sum + data.currentValue, 0);
    
  const totalDollarReturn = totalCurrentValue - totalInitialValue;
  
  // Fix: Guard against division by zero
  const totalReturnPct = totalInitialValue > 0 ? 
    (totalCurrentValue / totalInitialValue) - 1 : 0;
    
  // Fix: Guard against invalid power calculations
  let annualizedReturnPct = 0;
  if (yearsDiff > 0 && totalReturnPct >= -1 && isFinite(totalReturnPct)) {
    try {
      annualizedReturnPct = Math.pow(1 + totalReturnPct, 1 / yearsDiff) - 1;
      if (!isFinite(annualizedReturnPct)) annualizedReturnPct = 0;
    } catch (e) {
      console.error("Error calculating portfolio annualized return:", e);
    }
  }
  
  console.log("Portfolio summary:", {
    totalInitialValue,
    totalCurrentValue,
    totalDollarReturn,
    totalReturnPct,
    annualizedReturnPct
  });
  
  return html`
    <div class="card">
      <div class="card-body">
        <h5 class="card-title">Portfolio Performance</h5>
        <table class="table table-sm">
          <tbody>
            <tr>
              <th>Initial Investment:</th>
              <td>${formatCurrency(totalInitialValue)}</td>
            </tr>
            <tr>
              <th>Current Value:</th>
              <td>${formatCurrency(totalCurrentValue)}</td>
            </tr>
            <tr>
              <th>Holding Period Return:</th>
              <td>${formatPercent(totalReturnPct)} (${formatCurrency(totalDollarReturn)})</td>
            </tr>
            <tr>
              <th>Annualized Return:</th>
              <td>${formatPercent(annualizedReturnPct)}</td>
            </tr>
            <tr>
              <th>Time Period:</th>
              <td>${d3.timeFormat("%b %d, %Y")(startDate)} - ${d3.timeFormat("%b %d, %Y")(endDate)} (${yearsDiff.toFixed(1)} years)</td>
            </tr>
          </tbody>
        </table>
        
        <h5 class="mt-4">Security Performance</h5>
        <div class="table-responsive">
          <table class="table table-sm table-hover">
            <thead>
              <tr>
                <th>Asset Class</th>
                <th>Ticker</th>
                <th>Name</th>
                <th>Sector</th>
                <th>Asset Class Weight</th>
                <th>Risky Pf Weight</th>
                <th>Complete Pf Weight</th>
                <th>Initial Value</th>
                <th>Current Value</th>
                <th>Holding Period Return</th>
                <th>IRR (Annualized Return)</th>
              </tr>
            </thead>
            <tbody>
              ${Object.entries(tickerData).map(([ticker, data]) => html`
                <tr>
                  <td>${data.type}</td>
                  <td><strong>${ticker}</strong></td>
                  <td>${data.name}</td>
                  <td>${data.sector}</td>
                  <td>${formatPercent(data.assetClassWeight)}</td>
                  <td>${formatPercent(data.riskyPfWeight)}</td>
                  <td>${formatPercent(data.completeWeight)}</td>
                  <td>${formatCurrency(data.initialValue)}</td>
                  <td>${formatCurrency(data.currentValue)}</td>
                  <td>${formatPercent(data.totalReturn)} (${formatCurrency(data.dollarReturn)})</td>
                  <td>${formatPercent(data.annualizedReturn)}</td>
                </tr>
              `)}
            </tbody>
          </table>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  `;
};
```

#### Performance Over Time Chart

```{ojs}
// Create portfolio value chart with Plot - using the same data from metrics calculation
portfolioValueChart = {
  // Filter for just the Total Portfolio data points
  const portfolioValueData = portfolioData.filter(d => d.Portfolio === "Total Portfolio");
  
  if (portfolioValueData.length === 0) {
    return html`<div class="alert alert-warning">No portfolio value data available for charting</div>`;
  }
  
  // Use our pre-processed quotes data or the data from portfolioData
  const tickerPrices = processedQuotesData || portfolioData.tickerFirstLastPrices;
  const dateRange = portfolioData.datasetDateRange || {};
  const startDate = dateRange.startDate || new Date();
  const endDate = dateRange.endDate || new Date();
  
  // Calculate total initial value the same way as in the metrics display
  let totalInitialValue = 0;
  let tempTickerData = {};
  
  for (const [ticker, priceData] of Object.entries(tickerPrices)) {
    // Skip tickers with invalid price data
    if (!priceData.firstPrice || !priceData.lastPrice || 
        priceData.firstPrice <= 0 || priceData.lastPrice <= 0) {
      continue;
    }
    
    // Calculate weight factors with fallbacks
    const basicWeight = priceData.weight || 0;
    const equityWeightFactor = typeof equity_weight !== 'undefined' ? equity_weight : 0.6;
    const bondWeightFactor = typeof bond_weight !== 'undefined' ? bond_weight : 0.4; 
    const riskyWeight = typeof fixed_optimal_weight !== 'undefined' ? fixed_optimal_weight : 1.0;
    
    // Find ticker type
    const tickerInfo = Array.isArray(equity_tickers) ? 
      equity_tickers.find(t => t.Ticker === ticker) : null;
    const type = tickerInfo?.Type || priceData.type || "Equity";
    
    // Calculate complete weight
    const weightFactor = type === "Equity" ? equityWeightFactor : bondWeightFactor;
    const completeWeight = basicWeight * weightFactor * riskyWeight;
    
    const initialValue = investment_amount * completeWeight;
    totalInitialValue += initialValue;
    
    tempTickerData[ticker] = {
      weight: completeWeight,
      initialValue
    };
  }
  
  // Sort by date to ensure proper line order
  const sortedData = portfolioValueData.sort((a, b) => a.Date - b.Date);
  
  // Calculate adjusted values for each data point
  const adjustedData = sortedData.map(d => {
    // If this is sample data, just use it directly
    if (!tickerPrices || Object.keys(tickerPrices).length === 0) {
      return {
        Date: d.Date,
        Close: d.Close
      };
    }
    
    // Get the raw portfolio value for this date
    const rawValue = d.Close;
    
    // Calculate the adjustment ratio (if first point has different value)
    const firstRawValue = sortedData[0]?.Close || 1;
    const adjustmentRatio = totalInitialValue / firstRawValue;
    
    return {
      Date: d.Date,
      Close: rawValue * adjustmentRatio  // Scale all values proportionally
    };
  });
  
  // Get initial and final values from adjusted data
  const initialValue = adjustedData[0]?.Close || 0;
  const currentValue = adjustedData[adjustedData.length - 1]?.Close || 0;
  const totalReturn = initialValue > 0 ? (currentValue / initialValue) - 1 : 0;
  
  // Determine performance color based on return
  const performanceColor = totalReturn >= 0 ? "#28a745" : "#dc3545";
  
  return Plot.plot({
    marginLeft: 70,
    marginRight: 30,
    style: {
      fontSize: "14px",
      background: "transparent",
      overflow: "visible"
    },
    x: {
      type: "time",
      label: "Date",
      domain: [startDate, endDate],
      tickFormat: d => {
        const date = new Date(d);
        const month = date.getMonth();
        const year = date.getFullYear().toString().slice(-2); // Get just the last two digits
        const quarter = Math.floor(month / 3) + 1;
        return `Q${quarter} '${year}`; // Format as Q2 '20
      }
    },
    y: {
      grid: true,
      label: "Portfolio Value ($)",
      labelOffset: 45,
      domain: [0, Math.max(d3.max(adjustedData, d => d.Close) * 1.05, initialValue * 1.05)]
    },
    marks: [
      // Reference line for initial investment amount
      Plot.ruleY([initialValue], { 
        stroke: "#888", 
        strokeDasharray: "4 4",
        strokeWidth: 1
      }),
      
      // Label for initial investment
      Plot.text([{x: startDate, y: initialValue}], {
        text: `Initial Investment: ${formatCurrency(initialValue)}`,
        dy: -8,
        fontSize: 12,
        fontWeight: "bold",
        textAnchor: "start"
      }),
      
      // Area below the line for visual emphasis
      Plot.areaY(adjustedData, {
        x: "Date",
        y: "Close",
        fill: performanceColor,
        fillOpacity: 0.1,
        curve: "natural"
      }),
      
      // Main line showing portfolio value over time
      Plot.lineY(adjustedData, {
        x: "Date",
        y: "Close",
        stroke: performanceColor,
        strokeWidth: 3,
        curve: "natural",
        tip: true
      }),
      
      // Dot at current value
      Plot.dot(adjustedData.slice(-1), {
        x: "Date",
        y: "Close",
        r: 6,
        stroke: "white",
        fill: performanceColor
      }),
      
      // Current value label
      Plot.text(adjustedData.slice(-1), {
        x: "Date",
        y: "Close",
        text: d => `Current Value: ${formatCurrency(currentValue)}`,
        dy: -15,
        dx: 5,
        fontSize: 14,
        fontWeight: "bold"
      }),
      
      // Performance indicator
      Plot.text(adjustedData.slice(-1), {
        x: "Date",
        y: "Close",
        text: d => {
          const perf = (totalReturn * 100).toFixed(2);
          return perf >= 0 ? `+${perf}%` : `${perf}%`;
        },
        dy: 15,
        dx: 5,
        fontSize: 14,
        fontWeight: "bold",
        fill: performanceColor
      })
    ]
  });
}
```

:::

### Forecasts

```{ojs}
capitalAlocation = html`
  <div>
    <div style="width: 100%; height: 800px; position: relative;">
    <iframe height=800px width="100%" 
        id="capitalAlocation-embed" 
        title="capitalAlocation Embed"
        src="https://raw.githack.com/renan-peres/mfin-portfolio-management/refs/heads/main/dashboard/quarto/anychart_js.html"
        frameborder="0" allow="clipboard-write" allowfullscreen></iframe>
    </div>
  </div>
`;
```

```{ojs}
 html`
    <div class="card">
      <div class="card-body">
        <h5 class="mt-4">Asset Class Allocation</h5>
        ${createAllocationTable()}
      </div>
    </div>
`;
```

### Quotes

```{python}
#| echo: False
#| display: False

from itables import options, show
options.lengthMenu = [20, 50, 100]
options.classes = "display nowrap compact"
options.language = dict(info = "Showing _TOTAL_ entries")
options.paging = True
options.searching = False
options.ordering = True
options.info = True
options.lengthChange = True
options.autoWidth = True
options.responsive = True
options.scrollCollapse = True
options.keys = True
options.buttons = ['copy', 'excel', 'csv', 'pdf']
options.style = "width:100%;margin:auto"
options.columnDefs = [{"className": "dt-center", "targets": "_all"}]
```

::: {.panel-tabset style="height: calc(100vh - 450px); min-height: 400px; overflow-y: auto;"}

#### Daily

```{python}
# Display historical price data
show(daily_px.round(2).sort_values(by='Date', ascending=False).reset_index(), "Adjusted Closing Price (5Y Daily)", buttons = True)
```

#### Monthly

```{python}
show(monthly_px.round(2).sort_values(by='Date', ascending=False).reset_index(), "Adjusted Closing Price (5Y Monthly)", buttons = True)
```

:::

### Fundamentals

```{python}
# Order Columns
desired_order = ['Ticker', 'Weight', 'Date']
optimal_portfolio_fundamentals = equity_disp.drop(['Sharpe Ratio', 'Expected Return', 'Standard Deviation'], axis=1)
all_columns = optimal_portfolio_fundamentals.columns.tolist()
first_columns = [col for col in desired_order if col in all_columns]
remaining_columns = [col for col in all_columns if col not in first_columns]
new_order = first_columns + remaining_columns
optimal_portfolio_fundamentals = optimal_portfolio_fundamentals[new_order]

# Create transposed view
transposed_df = optimal_portfolio_fundamentals.sort_values(by="Weight", ascending=False).transpose()

# Display the result
display(transposed_df)
```

### Fund Fee Structure

:::
